set.xpath: /entity_classes/entity_class[@name='zombieMutatedRadiated' or @name='zombieScreamerRadiated']/effect_group[@name='Base Effects']/triggered_effect[@cvar='RadiatedRegenAmount']/@value

/entity_classes/entity_class[@name='animalZombieVultureRadiated' or @name='zombieArleneRadiated' or @name='zombieBoeRadiated' or @name='zombieBurntRadiated' or @name='zombieChuckRadiated' or @name='zombieDarleneRadiated' or @name='zombieInmateRadiated' or @name='zombieJanitorRadiated' or @name='zombieJoeRadiated' or @name='zombieLabRadiated' or @name='zombieMaleHazmatRadiated' or @name='zombieMarleneRadiated' or @name='zombieNurseRadiated' or @name='zombiePartyGirlRadiated' or @name='zombieRancherRadiated' or @name='zombieSteveRadiated' or @name='zombieTomClarkRadiated']/effect_group[@name='Base Effects']/triggered_effect[@cvar='RadiatedRegenAmount']/@value

/entity_classes/entity_class[@name='zombieSkateboarderRadiated' or @name='zombieSoldierRadiated' or @name='zombieSpiderRadiated' or @name='zombieWightRadiated' or @name='zombieYoRadiated']/effect_group[@name='Base Effects']/triggered_effect[@cvar='RadiatedRegenAmount']/@value
